name: agimodel--meet
description: Complete meeting intelligence system. Trigger whenever someone needs to run a meeting, prepare for one, recover from one that went badly, or fix a culture where meetings have become the enemy of work. Also triggers on phrases like "prepare for my meeting", "write an agenda", "we have too many meetings", "nothing gets decided in our meetings", "I have a difficult conversation coming up", or any scenario where people need to be in a room — or on a call — and something important needs to happen.
